conditions.today: 6 AM—The weekend is here, so why not set your sights on an incredible day of aerial tram flights and invigorating alpine delights? Clouds will cover the sky for the duration, adding an air of mysterious curiosity to the terrain that lies over that next undulation. Come ready to play in temperatures that reach the low 20s atop Rendezvous Mountain and the upper 30s at her base. Moderate winds will shift out of the west and blow between 5 and 25 mph. The competitors in the annual Dick's Ditch Classic are ready to send it with style and splendor, so come cheer them on if you're not a contender. Let them inspire you to be a top descender, and by the end of the day, you'll be packed with memories to always remember. -Lege
conditions.yesterday: 6 AM—Rise and greet a fresh Friday morning, Jackson. Rendezvous Mountain is waiting for your tender touch with 7 inches of high-grade pow over the past 24 hours. 2 of those buffed things up after the lifts closed, smoothing out yesterday's slashes and deepening any untouched stashes. Clouds, sunshine, and snow showers will all make appearances today thanks to an indecisive atmosphere that's in the mood to play. High temperatures will stall out in the upper teens outside Corbet's Cabin, while Teton Village makes a bid for the upper 30s. Cool north-northwest winds will be breezing in the 5-20 mph range. Periodic doses of powder flotation are more intoxicating than any available libation. Yet somehow far healthier than treatments suggested by the American Medical Association. So, don't feel bad about blowing work off for the slopes. Just chalk it all up to preventive medication. -Lege
